college_info.college_name: Sri Balaji College of Pharmacy: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Sri Balaji College of Pharmacy, is located in Jaipur, Rajasthan. Established in 2003, it is a private institute approved by PCI. Sri Balaji College of Pharmacy provides 2 UG courses in several specialisations. Theses programmes are offered in Full Time mode. B.Pharma and D.Pharma are some of the courses offered at Sri Balaji College of Pharmacy. Some of the stream in which these courses are offered include Medicine & Health Sciences. The total fee at Sri Balaji College of Pharmacy ranges between INR 1,09,000 to 2,80,000. Sri Balaji College of Pharmacy has a student intake of 120 for all the courses. Sri Balaji College of Pharmacy offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

reviews_list.review_title: A short headline that summarizes this college absolutely because of the faculty and good placement.

review_content.Placements: In our batch, 70 to 75 percent of students are placed successfully. The highest package offered is around 10 LPA while the lowest is about 3 LPA. The average package stood close to 5 to 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies included TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, and some core companies, depending on the branch. Around 60% of students also got internship opportunities in reputed firms, which helped in building practical exposure. The top roles offered were software engineer, data analyst, business associate, and some core technical roles. Overall, placement support was good, and the training sessions conducted by the placement cell really helped us prepare.

reviews_list.review_title: The college has good faculty, decent placements, and vibrant campus life.

review_content.Placements: Around 75% of D. Pharmacy students are placed. The highest package is 6 LPA, the lowest is 2 LPA, and the average is 3.5 LPA. Top recruiters are Apollo, Cipla, and Sun Pharma. 70% of students got internships in hospitals and pharma firms. The roles offered are pharmacist, QA, and MR.
review_content.Infrastructure: The D. Pharmacy department has Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, labs, and a library. The hostel offers clean rooms, 24/7 medical aid, sports facilities, and a gym. The mess food is hygienic with veg/non-veg options, and the canteen serves snacks and meals.

reviews_list.review_title: This is the best college for my bright future.

review_content.Placements: Shri Balaji College of Pharmacy has a good environment to study. There is a separate library for students. I am studying in B.Pharma 2nd year. There are proper classes for every batch, and there are great staff members too. I have a great opportunity to make my future bright through this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Shri Balaji College of Pharmacy has a very good building. There are many classrooms for students. There are separate staff rooms and also a guest house. There is a good environment in college to study. There are also playground and garden for the enjoyment of students.

review_summary.college_name: Government Postgraduate College, Ambala Cantt. Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Around 100-150 students get placed every year in our college. The highest salary offered is Rs.35,000 per month. The average salary offered is Rs.25,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is Rs.20,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Tata, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides fewer facilities. The food served in the mess is unhealthy and not good.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are not good. The teaching quality is up to the mark. They do not much care about the youth's future.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This college has provided us with experienced faculty members, good placements, etc.

content.Placements: Around 20% of students from the class are selected for placements. The roles offered are software engineers, app developers, hackers, and website developers. Top recruiting companies are Infotech and IT sectors. About 5% of the students got an internship in the 2nd year. It is a valuable course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. It has a library, computer labs, an NSS team, an NCC team, and a sports meet. College conducts fest and events from time to time.
content.Faculty: Faculty members here are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. Semester exams are a bit challenging because they make us more knowledgeable.

individual_reviews.title: It is a really good college. It has a nice infrastructure.

content.Placements: The college has a placement cell that offers students a chance to secure a job before the completion of their course. It also has an entrepreneurship cell which provides a lot of opportunities for startups. The college offers value-added courses from time to time to develop skills.
content.Infrastructure: The college does not provide any hostel or accommodation facilities. However, overall, the infrastructure is good. There are adequate computer labs, science labs and a big library also. The college has a big auditorium and seminar hall to conduct a lot of activities from time to time.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Many students get placement in our college.

content.Placements: In our course, students should have a minimum of 48% in academics to get placement. The highest salary offered is 1 lac per month, and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 10,000 per month. A top role offered is a software engineer. Companies like Microsoft and Google offered an internship for students.
content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities and infrastructure in our course and department. Our college provides a good Wi-Fi connection. The library is spacious, and the library staff members are good. Classrooms are spacious for students, and the benches are in good condition.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Non Medical - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: In this college, management and placements are not good.

content.Placements: Around 2-3% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 4 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. The average salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. One of my friends gets internships in AGS Health Private Ltd. The role offered is writer and laboratory assistant.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, Wi-Fi is not available, some classes are average, and the furniture is not good. It provides a library with air-conditioners, but the size is small. The hostel facility is not provided. The mess is also not available. It also does not provide medical facilities, only cricket is available but the ground is not in good condition.

faqs.question: How is the placement at Dr. NTR University of Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: The placement are good at Dr. NTR University of Health Sciences. Almost 85 percent students get placed. The highest salary offered is INR 8.5 Lacs Per Annum. Students get accompanied by top-class hospitals after their internships.

faqs.question: Are B.Sc placements at Dr. NTR University of Health Sciences good?
faqs.answer: Dr. NTR University of Health Sciences in Vijayawada has an 84–85% placement rate. The median placement income is INR 9.6 LPA, and the highest package is INR 12 LPA. The average package is 15 LPA. The top recruiting companies include Cauvery Hospital, Max Healthcare, and Apollo Medskills Limited. The top roles offered are medical offices and health inspectors. The placement cell provides training and preparation classes for students to prepare them for campus interviews. Some say that the placements are not very good. Others say that the university has some of the finest labs in the city but lacks much equipment.

faqs.question: What are the job opportunities available after completing BSc Medical Lab Technology from NTRUHS?
faqs.answer: After completing a BSc in Medical Lab Technology from NTRUHS, candidates have various career opportunities in the fields of healthcare, diagnostics, research, and education. Some of the prominent job roles after completing this course are as follows: Radiographer/ Radiologic Technologist CT/ MRI Technologist Ultrasound (Sonography) Technician Nuclear Medicine Technologist/ PET-CT Technician Radiation Therapist Medical Image Analysis Scientist, etc.

faqs.question: Which are the top recruiting companies that took part in campus placement at Dr. NTR University of Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: The top recruiting companies that took part in campus placement at Dr. NTR University of Health Sciences are Apollo Health Care, Sunshine Hospital, Yashoda Hospitals, etc. Develop Personality of the students by imparting the need-based training for improving their knowledge about the Medical Sector.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Osmania Medical CollegeReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Osmania = Best clinical exposure, the name itself stands high, and best for students dreaming high.
reviews.review_text: As it is one of the oldest hospitals in India, the hospital might not have very good infrastructure, but coming to the college, it is good. It is green everywhere, where we get interest to read and indulge in subjects and labs. Hostels and everything are fine, we can manage, and it is overall okay.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Osmania Medical CollegeReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Best ever college and worth it.
reviews.review_text: Good facility and everything over here. Good classes and facilities. Good mess and canteen available. Sports and all indoor and outdoor games. Quality of food in the mess and canteen is good, although. Available Wi-Fi is present in the campus premises.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Osmania Medical CollegeReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Osmania Medical College is a great college for MBBS, which provides a great exposure.
reviews.review_text: We have great lecture halls for every year and labs for all the subjects, and reference or reading rooms with air conditioning for us to study. A library full of books we need for the course, which are absolutely free with a library card.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Santhiram Medical CollegeReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: You get what you expect, but not in the stipend which you get in your internship.
reviews.review_text: All the infrastructure is fine. Classrooms are awesome with digital boards, light, central AC, but Wi-Fi connection will be limited. Hostel rooms are better, and the food is not that bad. Sports and games are also available. The canteen is superb.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Andhra Medical CollegeReviewed on 20 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has bad infrastructure, but it still provides a fabulous teaching and college experience.
reviews.review_text: Some rooms have very bad infrastructure and facilities. Some don't even have good washrooms. We need to run to other buildings to go to washrooms. Some building, like the centenary alumni building, has high-class infrastructure. It also provides full Wi-Fi, spacious labs, big classrooms, and an extraordinary library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Drs Sudha and Nageswara Rao Siddhartha Institute of Dental SciencesReviewed on 19 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I'd highly recommend this college to people who want to join the BDS.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and clinical equipment are pretty decent, but the overall building infrastructure looks kind of old school. The facilities are decent enough. We have a huge ground for sports, a library with tons of space, and a separate reading room. The labs are well-maintained.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by GSL Medical College and General HospitalReviewed on 16 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: We have a vast campus area. We can study in digitalised and well-ventilated classrooms with very good faculty. We have a smart lab. When we can practice on maneuvers and recently our campus is trying to excel on robotics surgeries too and to make the students relieved their stress there are courts for basketball, tabletennis, badminton volleyball ball and throw ball and for the fitness freaks there is a gym and a walking track & you can enjoy nature near the pond and for studies there is a green...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Andhra Medical CollegeReviewed on 2 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent place for MBBS students.
reviews.review_text: Our medical college provides well-equipped laboratory services, labs, digital classrooms, a central library, and 24x7 Wi-Fi access in academic blocks. The hospital attached to the college has good clinical exposure with multiple departments and adequate patient flow. Hostel facilities are decent with proper rooms, regular cleaning, and basic amenities. The mess food quality is average, but hygienic. The canteen offers additional options. There are also sports areas and reading rooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Kurnool Medical College,KurnoolReviewed on 28 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements in KMC in 2024 due to low cutoff.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of the government hostel are mostly good, some buildings are old in infrastructure, but the hostel is provided with repair facilities, though the petition for renovation of the hostel is still in process. The food quality of the mess is actually up to standard. We also have a facility to play sports such as badminton, tennis, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by SVMC - Sri Venkateswara Medical College, TirupatiReviewed on 16 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied, mainly with the cultural and sports activities.
reviews.review_text: Basic facilities like a good hostel, library, and a good hospital are available, but other modern facilities like Wi-Fi are not. Mess food is not as good as we expect, but it is okay to eat. The library should be developed much better. Canteens are available, and one good thing is that our hospital has high patient input, which helps us to interact more with patients and practice clinics better.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Siddartha Medical College, VijayawadaReviewed on 15 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college, I'm satisfied.
reviews.review_text: College-wise, it is a good college with modern equipment. It is an old college Hostel. It is good, but the washrooms are somewhat lacking in hygiene, but it is good. Mess food is good, with daily different meals they provide. As it is an old college hostel, it should be renovated.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Sibar Institute of Dental SciencesReviewed on 16 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: About our dental college in Guntur.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are very nice, and security is provided for students. The food and menu in the hostels are good. Hostel faculty are very helpful. Each room accommodates three members and has AC. The surroundings have trees, the environment is pleasant, and the weather is nice. The hostel blocks in the college are very big.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Sibar Institute of Dental SciencesReviewed on 16 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Sibar Dental College, Guntur.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the washrooms, benches, classrooms, and hostel mess food are very good. The meals include many snacks and tea during events. The college is mostly surrounded by fences, and there are no gaps in them. Sports and games are conducted using facilities outside the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Sibar Institute of Dental SciencesReviewed on 16 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Issues and matters about our college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the college were very good. Cultural and other events were grandly celebrated. The hostel food was good, and the mess was available in the canteen as well as on the college premises. Medical facilities were excellent. The sports and clubs were good for students’ health and fitness. The environment and the food were very good compared to other colleges in Guntur city.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Santhiram Medical CollegeReviewed on 9 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Santhiram Medical College.
reviews.review_text: All facilities and infrastructure are present in this course. Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library are available for our course students. Our course students get good hostel and canteen facilities. Sports and games are available for the college students.

review_content.Placements: Around 50% were placed. The salary packages range from Rs.50,000 to 2 LPA. Around 100% get internships. Surgeon, dentist, Professors, Hod, and Medical officer are the roles offered.

reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college with good teachers and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: In our college, approximately 40 students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 80,000 per month. The average salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Cipla, Pharmadocx, Bluebell Pharma, etc., visit our campus. Only 15-20% of students are placed at Pharmadocx and Cipla. Top roles offered are in marketing, clinical research, and compliance.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms and labs are well-built. All necessary equipment is available for experiments and analysis. Wi-Fi is not available on our campus. The library is spacious, and all books are available. The canteen is not available. The hostel facilities are not available.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Placements at this college are not good. But many companies visit the campus and offer average packages to students. Our batch is good and hardworking. This course is good for making a career. After B.Pharma we can open our medical store.

CUTM Rayagada courses include BPharma, BSc and DPharma as popular programmes, The Institute offers these courses for the duration of 2 to 4 years. CUTM Rayagada admission to any of these courses is based on merit. Therefore, candidates must fulfil the given eligibility criteria by securing valid scores in CUEE, CBSE 12, ISC, Odisha CHSE or any other equivalent qualification exam.
Centurion University of Technology and Management, Rayagada offers BPharma at the total tuition fees of INR 3.2 Lakh, BSc in INR 1.8 Lakh to 2..4 Lakh, depending on the specialisation opted for. Lastly, CUTM Rayagada DPharma is available at a total tuition fee of INR 1.6 Lakh. The Institute offers an annual intake of 100 seats for students pursuing BPharma. reviews_list.review_title: It has good infrastructure but lacks adequate faculty members.

review_content.Placements: There are 100 seats for every batch. As per the MBBS curriculum, every student gets internships after the final year. After qualifying in the NEET exam, students get admission here. Almost all students get placed in various branches of medical services. The majority of students do house-staffship after completion of the course. Others sit in the NEET PG exam and pursue an MD degree.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library has full network connectivity with good air conditioning, a vast reading area, adequate books, magazines, etc. There is a laboratory and demo room for every department. It has 5 digital lecture theatres and is air-conditioned. There is an auditorium for cultural events. It has a playground and separate boys' and girls hostels. There are lifts in the academic building and each hostel. The canteen is available in both the girl's and boys' hostel and also in the academic building. Teacher quarter, president doctor quarter, and nurse quarter are available inside the campus. It has a superspeciality hospital and oxygen plant established within campus. Infrastructure is very good but proper maintenance is needed. All types of sports are played here.
